rationale: The citing paper references Nair, Manchanda, and Bhatia (2010) only to point readers to prior work on social interactions in physician prescribing. In the citing paper's own model, the authors explicitly state that social interactions are not included, so the citation functions as contextual background rather than a building block. There is no evidence of direct reuse of the cited paper's framework, identification strategy, measures, or empirical design.
